title: 404 Error on External Secrets API Endpoint
symptom: When accessing the /rest/external-secrets/providers endpoint, a 404 error is returned stating 'Cannot GET /rest/external-secrets/providers'. This indicates that the endpoint is not available.
applies_when: Using n8n with external secrets feature
Running on a self-hosted instance with K8s
not_this_if: Endpoints work after a service restart
Using a different database than SQLite
root_cause: The 404 error occurs because the external secrets feature may not be fully initialized until the n8n service is restarted. This can happen in new deployments where the service has not yet fully loaded all features.
fix_steps: Cycle the node service to restart it
Check the external secrets endpoints again
agent_instruction: Restart the n8n node service within the container to resolve the 404 error on external secrets endpoints.
